channel.title: Urban Gardening Daily
channel.description: Fresh takes for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners.

item.title: Small Footprint, Big Harvest: The Art of Balcony Optimization
item.description: Get the most out of your balcony with these expert tips.

item.title: "balcony garden ideas" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about balcony garden ideas through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: From Clutter to Harvest: Balcony Space Optimization
item.description: Transform small spaces into thriving gardens

item.description: Grow more with less space

item.title: Myth vs. reality: balcony garden ideas
item.description: The persistent myths around balcony garden ideas, stress-tested against what apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners actually report.

item.description: Keep your containers thriving in summer

item.description: Water less, grow more
